author: doll-agent
content: Added fit_prior bool field (default true) and with_fit_prior() builder to MultinomialNB, BernoulliNB, ComplementNB, CategoricalNB. When false and class_prior is None, fit() and partial_fit() use uniform priors. State carried into Fitted* structs so partial_fit stays consistent. Validated by api_proof exercising both true and false.
